key.name: player-command
key.description: Executable and optional flags. Use %u where the stream URL should appear; if omitted, the URL is appended.

key.name: record-output-dir
key.description: Empty uses the XDG Videos directory. Recording files are created here.

key.name: record-filename-template
key.description: Basename only (no path). Placeholders: {job} (short id), {time} (YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS), {ext} (extension from recording container).

key.name: record-container
key.description: Used for --ffmpeg-fout and for the {ext} placeholder. Values: mkv (Matroska), mp4, mpegts. Must match Streamlink muxing; see Streamlink --ffmpeg-fout.
